text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Fine Motion is wild about ramen! ♪ Come have a
'Fine' time with your school friends in the lead-up
to the Shuka Sho!"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot a familiar name on a poster
advertising a weekly magazine hanging inside the
train!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hurriedly tell Fine Motion what I saw and the
apparent article included in this magazine.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Was there really?! Wow, it's like a dream!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I think the ads they put up in the trains have some
really artistic designs!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Having my name included in one feels like I've
become part of some artwork! ♪

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
If I may interject, we're already aware of the
article in question. Currently, we are discussing
how to deal with this matter, but...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
"Her Highness wishes for things to remain as they
are"... is what you're thinking. Correct?
choice_data_list: You're not going to have the article retracted?
You're not going to have the article retracted?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The article does nothing to disparage the dignity
of my family, so I don't see a problem.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And this is only my personal opinion, but I'm
thrilled that I can provide people with enjoyment.
In fact, I see it as part of my duty.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Though, I do feel bad you all have to worry over
little things like this on my account...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Having reporters show up all of a sudden like they
did at summer camp is certainly no good either,
so I can hardly welcome these things with open
arms. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her duty... When Fine Motion talks about herself,
she sometimes sounds rather detached. I wonder
if that comes from her upbringing or her own wise
nature.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, Fine!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Scarlet! It's lovely to see you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet approaches us. Not only is she one
of Fine Motion's friends, but I've heard that she is
immensely talented as well.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Um, I have something I wanted to tell you, but...
it's a little difficult to say.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Could it be about the advertisement in the train?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Oh, so you already know about it!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Yes. It looks like we're taking a wait-and-see
approach for the time being. But I appreciate
your concern. ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Don't mention it... Still, I can't believe they wrote
an article just about ramen. What nonsense!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Do you think so? I was quite pleased with it—they
even recommended some restaurants I might
enjoy. ♪

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: That is not appropriate compensation! Besides, there's so much more information they should have covered in an article about you!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oho, and what kind of article would you write
about me, Scarlet?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huh? I, um... That's...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'd write about the beautiful, elegant way you ran
in the Oka Sho and Japanese Oaks! And your
lovely, brilliant concert performances!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
The bottom line is that your races are amazing,
Fine! That's definitely what I'd write about!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
My, you're going to make me blush with all that
praise.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Maybe we can both be featured in an article one
day. One about racing, of course!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion certainly seems to have many good
school friends. After leaving the cafeteria, we run
into yet another one...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: F-Fine! Do you have a moment now?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hello, Rob Roy. Yes, what is it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion is greeted by Zenno Rob Roy, a
reserved Umamusume who loves reading and
helps out in the academy library. A lot of people
have high expectations for her on the track as
well.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Um, well... I... I'd like your opinion on this
selection of books.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
You see, there have been more and more
students who look up to you and want to learn
about Irish culture.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Really?! I'm so pleased to hear that!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Right. So that's why I wanted to choose some
books that would be educational while still being
accessible to younger readers.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I've selected several potential titles, but I'm at a
loss as to which ones to order... Would you mind
sharing your thoughts?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Of course! I'd be happy to help!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm off to help Rob Roy, Trainer. But I'll be back
in time for training!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I will!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that reminds me—I really enjoyed that novel
you recommended.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Really?! I-I also read the poetry collection you
told me about. It was wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion possesses a mysterious strength. It's
not just her talent—she has a certain something
that captivates other Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's little doubt that she'll reveal yet another
endearing aspect of herself at the Shuka Sho.
